flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Passaic County Community College are 15% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($37.0k vs $43.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Passaic County Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Passaic County Community College rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.5k → $7.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Passaic County Community College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (68.6% → 60.0%).
